[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011110110 6
1 100111001 5
2 010111111 7
3 001101001 4
4 011000101 4
5 001100100 3
6 110011111 7
7 011100100 4

01 10 011110110 6 match 0
12 21 111111111 a
23 32 110111111 8
34 43 011111111 8
45 54 011101101 6
56 65 011100101 5
67 76 111111111 a
70 07 111111111 a

02 20 111111101 8
13 31 011111111 8
24 42 101111001 6
35 53 011111111 8
46 64 001101101 5
57 75 111011111 8
60 06 011100100 4 match 7
71 17 111111111 a

03 30 011111111 8
14 41 011111111 8
25 52 111111101 8
36 63 011111111 8
47 74 111111111 a
50 05 011100101 5
61 16 011110110 6 match 0
72 27 110111111 8

04 40 011101101 6
15 51 011110111 7
26 62 101111101 7
37 73 110111111 8
